summary: Ordering bug is closed: both `oauth-start` and `oauth-callback` now resolve scoped secrets by key name rather than array position, and I found no remaining material scope-bypass, OAuth CSRF, or secret/token-in-URL/log leak in `connect`, `connect-oauth`, `oauth-start`, `oauth-callback`, or `src/lib/oauth-state.ts` under the repo’s stated localhost/single-user model.
